free_text: Study of the reaction Si28(A,P)P31 in the energy
range of alpha-particles from 11 up to 25 MeV.
Protons were detected by silicon diffusion-drift
counter. The thickness of sensitive layer was 2 mm.
Target was quartz glass(SiO2). Its thickness was from
corrected. DETECTOR was changed. In sub 001 DATA-ERR1
was replaced by DATA-ERR. In sub 002, 003, 005, 006
DATA-ERR2 was replaced by DATA-ERR1. Data presentation
in sub 002-004, 007-009 was changed. In sub 002-003,
